arts.ttl: Saturday’s briefing: Dinner on Garnacho and Rodri on road to recovery
arts.sum: Aston Villa moved into the last eight of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes' angry response to Roy Keane, 'crying' comments, apology rejection
arts.sum: Roy Keane has been a vocal critic of captain Bruno Fernandes ever since his arrival at Manchester United, with the pair clashing on a number of occasions in recent years

arts.ttl: Manchester United were wrong not to play me - leaving was the best decision I ever made
arts.sum: Andreas Pereira left Man United to join Fulham in July 2022 in a move that his aged very well - and he has absolutely no regrets about it.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes apology rejection, Roy Keane's calls to strip captain, Casemiro row
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes has seen a wealth of ups and downs since arriving at Old Trafford in January 2020, with former club captain Roy Keane taking a particular issue with the Portuguese midfielder

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Ruben Amorim hits back at Roy Keane as Alejandro Garnacho gesture revealed
arts.sum: Manchester United's midweek win against Ipswich was overshadowed by Alejandro's behaviour after being substituted, while Roy Keane has been vocal about his former club

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer points the blame for Ruben Amorim's Man Utd struggles
arts.sum: Manchester United have been frankly awful since Ruben Amorim’s arrival at Old Trafford and ex-Red Devils boss Ole Gunnar Solskjaer has picked out a major problem amid their poor season

arts.ttl: Fulham boss Marco Silva fires warning ahead of Man Utd FA Cup reunion
arts.sum: Fulham face Manchester United in the FA Cup, two years on from their trip to Old Trafford when Silva and two players were sent off in a 3-1 defeat - having been 1-0 up

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes 'embarrassed' Man United admission with Old Trafford claim
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as Ruben Amorim opens up on the challenges he's faced during his time at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Garnacho to buy team dinner for substitution reaction - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says Alejandro Garnacho "will pay for a meal for his team-mates" following his sub reaction against Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Max Dowman is Arsenal's future as teenage sensation bamboozles Manchester United
arts.sum: Brave Gunners on wrong side of result in FA Youth Cup thriller, but 15-year-old midfielder more than justifies the massive hype
